sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1736" key="a)ero/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀερό-μαντις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n1736.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">air-diviner</tr_>, Id. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Etym.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.9.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
